text:
Market today: Mild risk-on tone. The real driver for your names is headline 10 — SpaceX buzz is back, which directly lifts your two SpaceX plays. Broader macro is steady; oil rising slightly on Iran deal is a mild inflation signal, which historically rotates money away from growth/tech.

Your holdings: AVGO (-14.66%, largest position, TRIM signal) is your biggest concern — on margin, that loss is amplified and it's flagged for trimming; if it slides toward $336 stop, the damage gets real fast. PLTR (-11.08%, SELL signal) is also bleeding on margin with a clear exit signal — don't let hope override the scanner. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with limited price history; treat it as a small tactical bet only.

Watch: 1) AVGO price action — any further weakness toward $336 demands action. 2) SpaceX sentiment momentum — SPCX and SPAL are riding a narrative, not fundamentals; that can reverse sharply.

Bottom line: Margin makes AVGO and PLTR your fire drills — trim or cut before a bad day becomes a disaster.
